corrected_fields.summary: This is a static reference page providing operational trading information for NYSE venues, including trading hours, auction procedures, and market integrity mechanisms such as Limit Up/Limit Down (LULD) and Market-Wide Circuit Breakers (MWCB). The page covers NYSE, NYSE American, NYSE Arca, NYSE National, and NYSE Texas trading schedules.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page documents the operational framework of NYSE trading venues, including auction mechanisms, trading hours across multiple platforms, and volatility control systems. It provides the baseline rules and timing structure for equity and options trading on NYSE markets.
corrected_fields.market_structure_context: The page details NYSE market structure elements including: pre-opening order queuing, opening and closing auction procedures, imbalance freeze periods, MOO/LOO cancellation cutoffs, circuit breaker mechanisms (LULD and MWCB), and clearly erroneous execution review procedures. NYSE Bonds conducts two daily auctions at 4:00 a.m. and 8:00 a.m. ET.
